betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Nuclear Waste Disposal Drum§f allows §bRBMK§f nuclear waste to decay safely.

§eFunction:§f
• Accepts nuclear waste
• Allows radioactive decay over time
• Converts hot waste to decayed waste

§eNext Steps:§f
Decayed waste can be processed with:
• §bFEL§f and §bSILEX§f for rare element extraction
• Obtain §bBismuth§f and other valuable materials

§c§4RADIATION:§f The drum emits radiation when fuel is inside - maintain safe distance.

§aTip:§f Essential first step in the nuclear waste valorization chain.
